MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRACEY, CHARLES M. SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR JUL-19-1993 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 206 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON JUL-26-1993 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

CAUSE CALLED FOR COURT TRIAL. PL. PRESENT W/DAVID MENDEZ AS COUNSEL. PL. NOT PRESENT & IN PRO PER. PL WIT, JOHN TRACEY, S&E. PL. EXH.#1, 3 DAY NOTICE, ID & INTO EVID. JUDGMENT FOR PL. FOR RESTITUTION OF PREMISES AT 240 O'FARRELL, #701, S.F, CA. FORFEITURE OF RENTAL AGREEMENT. $1,620.18 RENT & DAMAGES. COSTS PER COST BILL. EXHIBITS WITHDRAWN. PL. ATTY TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HARMON, TERRENCE LEON THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 240 O'FARRELL ST, #701, S.F, CA. 94102 $1,620.18 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,620.18, LEASE FORFEITED, COSTS PER COST BILL.
